sql_query.query: WITH caller AS (SELECT u.id, u.organization_id FROM users u JOIN organizations o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.active = TRUE WHERE u.id = $1 AND u.organization_id = $2 AND u.role = $3 AND u.role = 'admin' AND u.active = TRUE), raw_input AS (SELECT (item->>'id')::bigint AS id, (item->>'cohortId')::bigint AS cohort_id, item->>'label' AS label, item->>'description' AS description, item->>'type' AS step_type, item->>'role' AS role, (item->>'position')::integer AS position, (item->>'slaHours')::integer AS sla_hours, (item->>'active')::boolean AS active FROM jsonb_array_elements($4::jsonb) item), validated AS (SELECT r.*, ca.organization_id FROM raw_input r CROSS JOIN caller ca JOIN cohorts c ON c.id = r.cohort_id AND c.organization_id = ca.organization_id AND c.active = TRUE WHERE r.id > 0 AND r.position > 0 AND r.step_type IN ('evidence', 'approval', 'payout', 'receipt') AND r.role IN ('learner', 'mentor', 'finance', 'admin', 'system') AND length(r.label) BETWEEN 1 AND 160 AND length(r.description) BETWEEN 1 AND 2000 AND (r.sla_hours IS NULL OR r.sla_hours BETWEEN 1 AND 720) AND r.active IS NOT NULL), authorized_input AS (SELECT * FROM validated WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM raw_input) BETWEEN 1 AND 20 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validated) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM raw_input) AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM validated) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validated) AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (cohort_id, position)) FROM validated) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validated)), deactivated AS (UPDATE workflow_steps ws SET active = FALSE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ws.organization_id = (SELECT organization_id FROM caller) AND ws.cohort_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT cohort_id FROM authorized_input) AND ws.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM authorized_input) RETURNING ws.id), upserted AS (INSERT INTO workflow_steps (id, organization_id, cohort_id, label, description, step_type, role, position, sla_hours, active, created_at, updated_at) SELECT a.id, a.organization_id, a.cohort_id, a.label, a.description, a.step_type, a.role, a.position, a.sla_hours, a.active, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM authorized_input a CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deactivated) deactivation_guard ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET label = EXCLUDED.label, description = EXCLUDED.description, step_type = EXCLUDED.step_type, role = EXCLUDED.role, position = EXCLUDED.position, sla_hours = EXCLUDED.sla_hours, active = EXCLUDED.active, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE workflow_steps.organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id AND workflow_steps.cohort_id = EXCLUDED.cohort_id RETURNING id, organization_id, cohort_id) SELECT ws.id, ws.cohort_id AS "cohortId", ws.label, ws.description, ws.step_type AS type, ws.role, ws.position, ws.sla_hours AS "slaHours", ws.active FROM workflow_steps ws WHERE ws.organization_id = (SELECT organization_id FROM caller) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upserted u WHERE u.organization_id = ws.organization_id AND u.cohort_id = ws.cohort_id) ORDER BY ws.position, ws.id
